# AI-readable index of governed-compression.
# Private research implementation surface for governed vector and KV-cache compression. Last updated: 2026-06-14.

# Query API: LLMs can parse this file to understand compression research capabilities
# Installation: git clone https://github.com/hummbl-dev/governed-compression.git
# Documentation: https://github.com/hummbl-dev/governed-compression
#
# governed-compression categories:
#   HUMMBL:COMPRESSION Governed vector and KV-cache compression
#   HUMMBL:RESEARCH Private research implementation surface
#   HUMMBL:BENCHMARKS Reproducible benchmarks for compression methods

## Overview

Private research implementation surface for governed vector and KV-cache compression.

## Purpose

This repo exists to provide a better implementation surface than the current fragmented TurboQuant-adjacent landscape.

Core goals:
- CPU reference implementation first
- reproducible benchmarks
- Windows via WSL2 first
- tuple-based experiment logging from day one
- method comparison across TurboQuant-style, QJL, and simple baselines

## Initial Scope

- vector encode / decode
- approximate dot product
- method comparison (TurboQuant-style, QJL, baselines)
- reproducible benchmarks
- tuple-based experiment logging

## Usage

```bash
# Run benchmarks
python benchmarks/run.py

# Compare methods
python tools/compare.py --method turboquant --method qjl
```
